extDescription.message: Send pages and cookies from this browser to the local Capsule app for forensic capture.

permissionRequiredTitle.description: Title shown when the popup needs the user to grant host permission for a site.

permissionRequiredBody.message: Capsule needs access to $HOST$ to read its cookies. Click the action again and choose Allow.
permissionRequiredBody.description: Body explaining why the host permission is needed.

permissionDeniedTitle.description: Title shown after the user dismisses the host-permission prompt.

unsupportedSchemeBody.message: Cookies can only be read on http:// or https:// pages.
unsupportedSchemeBody.description: Body shown when the active tab is on a chrome://, about:, or other unsupported scheme.

noCookiesFoundTitle.description: Title for the result screen when permission was granted but the page had no cookies.

noCookiesFoundBody.message: Make sure you're signed in on this tab, then try again.

captureModeLabel.description: Label for the capture mode segmented control.

captureModeWebpage.description: Capture mode pill: page snapshot only, skip media download.

captureModeMedia.description: Capture mode pill: force media download path.

captureModeGallery.description: Capture mode pill: force gallery-dl image capture path.
